title: AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIO OF SIAYAN IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF SINDANGAN, PROVINCE OF ZAMBOANGA DEL NORTE.

chunks.text:
H. No. 1650 / 55 OG No. 39, 8225 (September 28, 1959)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2553, June 21, 1959 ]

AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIO OF SIAYAN IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF SINDANGAN, PROVINCE OF ZAMBOANGA DEL NORTE.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The sitios of Siayan, Bentol, Litalet, Dibalan, Colaton, Moyo Gamay, Pasi and Dalongdong in the Municipality of Sindangan, Province of Zamboanga del Norte, are constituted into a distinct and independent barrio of said municipality to be known as the barrio of Siayan.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without executive approval, June 21, 1959.
